reasoning_content:
Now I can see the original `_draw_label` method. It draws the label at `self.end_y_position`. To draw it above the chromosome, I need to place it at `self.start_y_position` plus some offset, or maybe at `self.start_y_position + something`.

Let me also look at how the chromosome is drawn to understand the coordinate system better.

function.name: run_custom_test
